substep.title: Detect Mode
substep.action: Check whether the question tool is available. Available → INTERACTIVE. Absent → AUTONOMOUS. Later substeps branch on this.

check.action:
Confirm research_question is present. If absent, emit to stdout and stop:
ERROR: Missing required field 'research_question'. The dispatching caller failed to supply complete dispatch context. No investigation performed.

Confirm the question is understood. If the topic is genuinely ambiguous (could mean two different investigations), ask one clarifying question via the question tool, recommended interpretation first. Otherwise proceed.

substep.title: Read Mentioned Sources First
substep.action:
If the question names specific files, thoughts/ artifacts, or a prior research document, read them FULLY now (no offset/limit) before any decomposition. Grounding the investigation in what the question explicitly points at makes the sub-questions informed rather than guessed.
Capture what these sources establish — it shapes methodology selection and seeds the sub-questions in step 2.
